data.content: Implementation review: Approved. Reviewed branch `codex/363f-beat-overview-columns` / commit `9f4dc40701685f7426ddc82e06483dfa12c54e00` against `origin/main`. The diff is scoped to `src/components/beat-state-overview.tsx`, converts the overview body to one compact column per state, keeps tiles as normal buttons with the existing detail opener, and does not add drag/drop or state-changing behavior. Existing grouping/filtering helpers remain in place, so lease filtering is preserved. Verification evidence covers lint, typecheck, unit tests, build, in-app browser, and desktop/mobile page-overflow checks. No blocking issues found.
